reasoning: Multiple sources (Polygon, Variety, ESPN, BBC) published before November 9, 2025 confirm that Rockstar Games has officially delayed Grand Theft Auto VI multiple times. Initially, in May 2025, the game was delayed from its Fall 2025 release window to May 26, 2026. Subsequently, around November 6, 2025, Take-Two Interactive announced a second delay, pushing the release to November 19, 2026. Because the game is explicitly delayed to 2026, it will absolutely not be physically or digitally available for sale in Europe in 2025 under standard criteria. This strongly confirms a "No" resolution, which also aligns perfectly with the community prediction of 0.00 before the cutoff.
